name: spirit
title: Framework 4 — spirit (parallel front end + ranked question portfolio + honest multiplicity + carry-forward firewall)
description: Extends grounded2. A parallel front end (data module || literature) joins at a question gate that builds a ranked portfolio of questions (CAN and SHOULD), pre-registers it as the multiple-comparison family, and tests it with multiplicity-corrected inference. Per-question explore->design->design-check(firewall)->experiment->summarize, a stage referee, an importance gate that loops back to the portfolio, draft<->editor, a final referee, reproduction+audit, and an orchestrator-authored introspection. 'No contribution' is a valid terminus. Accepts a research domain, an idea, and/or a dataset (>=1 required); a domain-only run lets literature-scout generate candidate questions from recent papers' open-research/next-step sections. front-end(source+seal+audit+profile || literature) -> question-gate -> [explore->design->design-check->experiment->summarize]* -> stage-referee -> importance-gate -> draft<->editor -> final-referee -> reproduce+audit -> introspect.
